description_long: This is a modern, two-story bungalow with a flat roof and a minimalist architectural style. The exterior features a combination of white and gray walls, accented by dark window frames and wood-textured panels. Large, rectangular windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, providing ample natural light to the interior. The structure includes a prominent garage extension on one side, with a sleek, horizontal slatted design. There are multiple outdoor platforms and terraces, some covered and some open, enhancing the living space. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a blend of functional and aesthetic elements.
description: A modern two-story bungalow with a flat roof, large asymmetrical windows, and a prominent garage extension. The exterior combines white, gray, and wood-textured panels for a sleek, minimalist look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and a covered terrace area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage extension and the layered, cantilevered structure.
description_view_2: Rear view with the garage door, smaller windows, and a clear view of the flat roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional terraces and the wood-textured paneling.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
